editionData.title: June 3, 2026: Rubio details U.S. demands as Iran peace talks falter; Russia hammers Ukrainian cities, killing at least 22
editionData.description: Global headlines: Rubio details U.S. demands as Iran peace talks falter (The secretary of state is testifying publicly to Congress for the first time since the war began, as the regional conflict worsens and lawmakers’ patience runs thin); Russia hammers Ukrainian cities, killing at least 22 (Moscow has intensified aerial bombing of Ukrainian cities as its battlefield advances have stalled); and Kenyan court extends order blocking U.S. hospital for American Ebola patients (The court extended for seven days its order stopping the opening of the U.S. field hospital. It also directed the Kenyan government to detail its deal with the U.S). Markets leaned higher, with 5 of 7 tracked indexes up; Nikkei 225 up 2.57% was the largest move. Benchmarks tracked: S&P 500, NASDAQ Composite, Euronext 100 Index, and Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS plus 3 more indexes. Hacker News: Use your Nvidia GPU's VRAM as swap space on Linux (Use your NVIDIA GPU's VRAM as swap space on Linux. Built for laptops with soldered memory and no upgrade path. If you have an RTX card...); 1-Click GitHub Token Stealing via a VSCode Bug (My blog, mostly about programming); and MAI-Code-1-Flash (We make responsible AI to empower people's lives). Product Hunt features Overline (Real-time AI captions and translation for any browser video), Brief (Navigate your agents to product-market fit), and Vokal (A collaboration space for 10x teammates with their Al agents).
editionData.author: Sony Mathew

headlines.title: Rubio details U.S. demands as Iran peace talks falter
headlines.summary: The secretary of state is testifying publicly to Congress for the first time since the war began, as the regional conflict worsens and lawmakers’ patience runs thin.

headlines.title: Russia hammers Ukrainian cities, killing at least 22
headlines.summary: Moscow has intensified aerial bombing of Ukrainian cities as its battlefield advances have stalled.

headlines.title: Kenyan court extends order blocking U.S. hospital for American Ebola patients
headlines.summary: The court extended for seven days its order stopping the opening of the U.S. field hospital. It also directed the Kenyan government to detail its deal with the U.S.

headlines.title: Israel says it is holding off on striking Beirut after U.S. request
headlines.summary: Tehran suspended ceasefire negotiations because of Israel’s escalating military attacks in Lebanon and U.S. strikes, an Iranian official told The Post.

headlines.title: As Russia fails to achieve war aims in Ukraine, Putin needs a way out
headlines.summary: European officials say Moscow's escalating aggression is a result of increasing difficulties that Russia is facing militarily and economically.

headlines.title: Tunisian court sentences Ennahdha leader Rached Ghannouchi to life in prison
headlines.summary: Opposition leader and dozens of other defendants handed lengthy prison terms for 'forming a terrorist alliance'.

headlines.title: Zimbabwe’s e-tricycle crackdown puts rural women’s livelihoods at risk
headlines.summary: Zimbabwe’s e-tricycle scheme for rural women is being squeezed by high fees, licensing rules and police enforcement.

headlines.title: Trump to attend delayed White House Correspondents’ Dinner after shooting
headlines.summary: Press freedom advocates, however, have warned that the dinner could give Trump a podium to attack the news media.

headlines.title: US strikes Iran’s Qeshm Island, says Tehran targeted Kuwait, Bahrain
headlines.summary: US President Trump reported to lash out at Israeli PM Netanyahu over Israel’s threat to strike Beirut suburbs.

headlines.title: European election monitor dismisses rumours of fraud in Colombia’s election
headlines.summary: The electoral mission described the first round of voting in Colombia's presidential race as 'a lesson in democracy'.

headlines.title: Supreme Court reinstates Republican-favored Alabama congressional districts
headlines.summary: The ruling means that Alabama's 2026 midterm elections will feature six Republican-leaning districts and one Democratic-leaning one.

headlines.title: DOJ is investigating former congressman George Santos for insider trading on Kalshi
headlines.summary: The disgraced former congressman allegedly bet on whether he would appear at the State of the Union address, prompting federal investigations.

headlines.title: Scenes from the aftermath of Russia's latest massive attack on Kyiv
headlines.summary: Russian missile and drone attacks killed civilians across Ukraine overnight, in one of Moscow's largest assaults in recent months.

headlines.title: Trump signs AI safety order seeking voluntary review of new models
headlines.summary: The order asks AI companies to voluntarily submit their most powerful models for the government to test up to 30 days before releasing them to the public.

headlines.title: 5 ways to reduce everyday exposure to 'forever chemicals'
headlines.summary: Mara Hoplamazian has spent years reporting on 'forever chemicals,' or PFAS. Here's what they've learned about what may help limit everyday exposure to the contaminant.

headlines.title: China-Laos ties yield strong outcomes
headlines.summary: Connectivity paves way for win-win cooperation

headlines.title: Chinese team to support Ebola response in DRC
headlines.summary: A Chinese medical team arrived in Kinshasa, the capital of the Democratic Republic of Congo, on Tuesday for a three-month mission to support the Central African country's response to an Ebola outbreak.

headlines.title: Three-day public funeral planned for Iran's late supreme leader
headlines.summary: TEHRAN -- A three-day public funeral has been planned for Iran's former Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei in Tehran, Qom and Mashhad, state-run IRIB TV said on Tuesday.

headlines.title: Confidence in value of UK university degrees falls
headlines.summary: Public confidence in UK university degrees has fallen over the past two decades, with around one in three now saying a degree is not worth the time or cost, amid concerns over the job market, student debt, loan fairness, and the impact of AI on employment.

headlines.title: Japan's remilitarization slammed
headlines.summary: Japan's recent efforts to strengthen its security and defense capabilities, including plans to expand its intelligence framework and revise key security policies, have sparked concerns at home and abroad over the country's remilitarization.

headlines.title: Five new judges join Supreme Court following increase in sanctioned strength
headlines.summary: CJI Surya Kant will administer the oath to five new Supreme Court judges in a special ceremony on June 2, 2026.

headlines.title: Sarthak Sidhant flags CBSE OSM tender irregularities before Parliamentary panel
headlines.summary: Teenager Sarthak Sidhant exposes CBSE tender irregularities to Parliament, prompting assurances from officials about the On-Screen Marking system.

headlines.title: DRDO, IAF successfully flight-test indigenous RudraM-II air-to-surface missile
headlines.summary: DRDO and IAF successfully test the indigenous RudraM-II missile, enhancing India's precision strike capabilities and self-reliance in defense.

headlines.title: INDIA bloc to meet on June 8 amid strain; Trinamool, DMK set to attend
headlines.summary: The INDIA bloc's June 8 meeting aims to address tensions and project unity among 17 opposition parties ahead of elections.

headlines.title: Will continue to fight BJP till they are defeated, says Mamata
headlines.summary: Mamata Banerjee leads a chaotic dharna in Kolkata, protesting post-poll violence against TMC workers after BJP's election victory.

headlines.title: Iran's IRGC attacks US Fifth Fleet headquarters, airbase, local media reports
headlines.summary: Reuters: Iran's IRGC attacks US Fifth Fleet headquarters, airbase, local media reports.

headlines.title: Hostilities flare in Iran war, oil jumps with talks at a stalemate
headlines.summary: Reuters: Hostilities flare in Iran war, oil jumps with talks at a stalemate.

headlines.title: US fires Hellfire missile at tanker heading toward Iran
headlines.summary: Reuters: US fires Hellfire missile at tanker heading toward Iran.

headlines.title: Exclusive: Meta scales back plan for internal mouse-tracking tech, citing staff concerns
headlines.summary: Reuters: Exclusive: Meta scales back plan for internal mouse-tracking tech, citing staff concerns.

headlines.title: US sanctions Iran's largest crypto exchange over IRGC links
headlines.summary: Reuters: US sanctions Iran's largest crypto exchange over IRGC links.

hackerNews.title: My thoughts after using Clojure for about a month
hackerNews.summary: I am now generating this website with Clojure (yes, right after rewriting it in GNU Make and shell ; I have a problem, ok?). In a personal tradition, I used writing a static site generator as the project to play with and learn Clojure as a new language. While I’ve long scoffed at Clojure for its copious syntax ( three types of brackets!?), it turns out to be pretty ergonomic and powerful. Here are my impressions after playing around with Clojure for about a month.

hackerNews.summary: Roku provides the simplest way to stream entertainment to your TV. On your terms. With thousands of available channels to choose from.
